ProLuxe Travel

By introduction. Hand-kept, by design.

The quiet team, handling hotels the way you would.

High-touch support on the hotel side of your principal's trip. You stay engaged, we carry the coordination.

The way we work

  1. 01

    Their usual, every time.

    Preferences carried across cities; each hotel briefed only to the level the stay requires.

  2. 02

    Handled on our side, visible on yours.

    Late arrivals, early check-ins, awkward swaps. You stay on every update; the fixing stays with us.

  3. 03

    The room you arranged with us is waiting for you in New York.

    1 team across every city, with the same eye for detail.

  4. 04

    1 contact, access to every hotel.

    Reservations leads, GMs, duty managers, concierges. Every relationship already in place, every line open through us.

A recent trip

A suite needed at short notice, in a city running at capacity. The call went direct to the reservations director; held before the conversation ended.

Recent work

  • Currently running an international-event programme. Attendee accommodation across multiple hotels, on a booking platform built for it.
  • Ongoing multi-country accommodation for a global executive team: 4 countries, 1 standard, direct-dealing with each reservations desk.
  • Ongoing private travel for a family office: multiple cities a year, discreet bookings, hotels briefed only to the level each stay requires.

Enquiries are handled directly by Myles. Current availability on request.

Direct line
